title: per-group history
manager: Per-group history — a group can remember which of its members was last active, so re-entering the group returns you there (the history-pseudostate idea, scoped to a group). This is what lets a "paused" region resume where it left off instead of resetting to the start, modeled cleanly at the group level rather than bolted onto individual states with hand-tracked bookkeeping.
cs: per-group history (shallow/deep per config); re-entry restores the last-active member; interacts with nest vs spread (W6.81) and the statechart history pseudostate (W7.30).
